translation.title: Title
translation.communityActivity: Here's what's happening in your community
translation.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out? You will need to sign in again to access your dashboard.
translation.name: Name
translation.heroSubtitle: Help reunite lost items with their owners through our community-powered platform
translation.everythingYouNeed: Everything you need to find or return lost items
translation.advancedSearchDesc: Find lost items quickly with powerful filters, categories, and location-based search
translation.mapTrackingDesc: See items on an interactive map and find things near you with geolocation
translation.secureChatDesc: Communicate safely without sharing personal information
translation.qrCodeSharingDesc: Generate and share QR codes for easy item identification
translation.realTimeUpdatesDesc: Get instant notifications when someone finds your item
translation.bilingualSupportDesc: Available in English and Nepali for wider accessibility
translation.simpleSteps: Three simple steps to reunite with your lost items
translation.postYourItemDesc: Create a detailed post with photos, description, and location where you lost or found the item
translation.connectChatDesc: Get matched with potential owners or finders and communicate securely through our chat system
translation.reuniteDesc: Arrange a safe meetup and reunite with your lost item or help someone find theirs
translation.joinCommunity: Join our community and help make a difference
translation.aboutPara1: Lost & Found Community is a platform dedicated to reuniting people with their lost belongings. We believe that losing something valuable shouldn't mean it's gone forever. Through the power of community and technology, we make it easier than ever to report lost items and help others find what they've lost.
translation.aboutPara2: Our mission is to create a trusted, efficient, and user-friendly platform where anyone can post about lost or found items, connect with others, and facilitate the safe return of belongings. With features like real-time chat, location mapping, QR code generation, and a reward system, we incentivize community participation and make the process seamless.
translation.aboutPara3: Whether you've lost your wallet, found a pet, or discovered someone's belongings, Lost & Found Community is here to help. Join thousands of users who are making a difference, one item at a time.
translation.copyright: © 2024 Lost & Found Community. All rights reserved.
